Deepti Sharma is among Test cricket’s best bowlers

In only 10 innings in six Test matches India’s Deepti Sharma features among Test cricket’s elite bowlers.

Test matches

One-Day Internationals

T20 Internationals

40

Average (Runs conceded per wicket)

5

Economy (Runs conceded per over)

Strike rate (Balls bowled per wicket)

Strike rate (Balls bowled per wicket)

Note: Minimum 20 wickets for Test matches, minimum 70 wickets for One-Day Internationals and minimum 50 wickets for T20 Internationals.

Source: Cricinfo
